title: piper excelsum subsp. delangei
intro: Piper excelsum subsp. delangei, also known as Piper excelsum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. It is a climber that is native to the forests of Papua New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The leaves and stems of the plant are used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health.
